summary: Completed testing modified FX broker back-office system. Major architectural changes verified: Trading Accounts removed, Treasury management added, Accountant role with approval workflow implemented. Backend API fully functional (21/21 tests passed). Frontend authentication and navigation working with minor session management issues.

integration_issues.issue: Session appears to expire quickly during extended UI interactions
integration_issues.impact: Users may get logged out when performing multi-step operations like creating transactions
integration_issues.workaround: Login works consistently for individual operations

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@fxbroker.com / admin123 credentials
Accountant login with accountant@fxbroker.com / accountant123 credentials
Dashboard loads with correct stats (7 clients, $195,000 treasury balance, 39 pending actions)
Navigation sidebar correctly shows new structure: no Trading Accounts, includes Treasury and Approvals
All navigation links work: Dashboard, Clients, Transactions, Treasury, Reports, Settings, Approvals
Treasury page displays bank accounts with balances and types
Role-based access control: Accountant can view Treasury but cannot see Add Account button (admin-only)
Accountant Dashboard shows 39 pending transactions for approval
Pending transactions display client selection (not trading accounts) with proof upload capability
Transaction destinations show bank accounts (Main Operating Account - Chase Bank)
Approve/Reject functionality visible with 39 approve and 39 reject buttons
Charts and analytics display correctly on Dashboard
KYC status distribution shows approved/pending clients
Recent transactions and clients sections populated
Backend API endpoints: 21/21 tests passed
Seed data creation working
Client CRUD operations functional
Treasury accounts CRUD operations (admin-only)
Transaction creation with client and destination bank selection
Transaction approval workflow for accountants
Reports and analytics endpoints
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor session management issue: Authentication sessions may expire quickly during extended operations. Consider increasing session timeout or implementing session refresh mechanism for better user experience.
